texto: Take a deep breath and start again . When things are not turning in your way , sometimes it is good to take a break and try it again because the life may sometimes offer a surprising chance which will be waiting for you.
explicacao: Citação de Rajat sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Take a deep breath and start again . When things are not turning in your way , sometimes it is go…” articula reflexao, inspirational-quotes, again em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
